title: chenopodium candolleanum subsp. candolleanum
intro: Chenopodium candolleanum subsp. candolleanum is a subspecies of the Chenopodium candolleanum plant, commonly found in the Mediterranean region, which belongs to the family Amaranthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Chenopodium candolleanum subsp. candolleanum include treating digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from pain and swelling. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used topically in the form of ointments or salves to harness its medicinal properties.
